message:
fix: clamp wait tool timeout to minimum 30s to prevent rapid-retry burn

Benchmark analysis showed the model sometimes calls wait with 1-second
timeouts, burning 10+ rounds on rapid retries before the subagent
finishes. Clamping to 30s minimum and updating the tool description
to guide toward 120s+ timeouts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9,6 +9,10 @@ import (
 	"time"
 )
 
+// minWaitTimeoutMS is the minimum timeout for the wait tool, preventing the model
+// from burning rounds with rapid 1-second retries.
+const minWaitTimeoutMS = 30_000 // 30 seconds
+
 // SubAgentStatus tracks the lifecycle of a sub-agent.
 type SubAgentStatus string
